title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at an airport. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A family is waiting at an airport with their suitcases. The parents are looking at a departures screen while their daughter is sitting on a suitcase. There are other travellers and large windows in the terminal.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows children drawing outside. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two children are drawing colourful pictures with chalk on the ground in a park. One child is kneeling and drawing a sun while the other is holding several pieces of chalk. There are trees and a playground behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
